class.name: legged/Go2SquatController
class.description: The basic legged squat controller for making the Unitree Go2 stand up and sit down.

class.name: legged/LeggedGo2TabletController
class.description: Tekir's controllers on implemented on Go2.

class.name: legged/Go2BalanceController
class.description: Balance controller for unitree Go2 robot.

class.name: legged/Go2MPC
class.description: MPC controller for unitree Go2 robot.

class.name: legged/Go2WBC
class.description: WBC controller for unitree Go2 robot.

class.name: legged/Go2WBIC
class.description: WBIC controller for unitree Go2 robot.
